calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Relative To Charitable Remainder Trust
Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ken Nabity for Mary Cavanaugh (Petitioner).

Mr. Nabity stated that there are no objections and that both Parties have consented. The Court granted the Petition for Instructions Relative to Charitable Remainder Trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
